tasks.title: Extend RepoSnapshot and Implement Cache History Structure
tasks.description: Update data model with previous_snapshot_at, snapshot_history_id and implement rolling history cache with 20 snapshots, purge older than 30 days.

tasks.title: Implement ThemeConfig Parsing and Rendering
tasks.description: Create ThemeConfig struct and theme.toml parser with built-in themes (default, monochrome, high-contrast, solarized-dark, dracula, gruvbox).

tasks.title: Add StatusBarConfig and Customizable Status Bar
tasks.description: Implement StatusBarConfig with max 3 items from enum (SyncState, RateLimit, etc.) and render dynamically.

tasks.title: Implement Braille Charts for Stars Panel
tasks.description: Replace bar sparklines with Unicode Braille patterns (⣿⣷⣦⣄) using ratatui Canvas for 2x resolution.

tasks.title: Build LayoutConfig and PanelLayout System
tasks.description: Implement resizable panel layouts with persistence to layout.toml including presets (default, compact, wide).

tasks.title: Add Mini-Map Overview Mode (m key)
tasks.description: Toggle condensed 2-3 line view showing 12+ metrics across all panels.

tasks.title: Implement Panel Detach/Zoom Mode (Enter key)
tasks.description: Expand selected panel to 80% screen real estate with panel-specific detail views.

tasks.title: Add Contextual Action Hints to Status Bar
tasks.description: Dynamic status bar showing panel-specific shortcuts.

tasks.title: Implement Search/Filter Within Panels (/ key)
tasks.description: Interactive search prompt with panel-specific filtering (title, labels, username).

tasks.title: Add Panel-Specific Timeframe Controls (+/- keys)
tasks.description: Contextual +/- controls for each panel (timeframes, pagination, list sizes).

tasks.title: Implement Mouse-Resizable Panels
tasks.description: Drag panel borders to resize with persistence.

tasks.title: Build Fuzzy Finder Integration (f key + external)
tasks.description: Internal fuzzy search overlay + external repowatch --list | fzf support.

tasks.title: Create Command Palette (: key)
tasks.description: Vim-style command palette with autocomplete and history.

tasks.title: Implement Split-Screen Diff Mode (d key)
tasks.description: Compare current vs previous snapshot with change highlighting.

tasks.title: Add Copy-to-Clipboard Integration (c key)
tasks.description: Contextual clipboard copy with toast notification.

tasks.title: Implement All Animations and Visual Polish
tasks.description: Add panel highlight flash, count-up numbers, sync pulse, braille spinner, sparkline draw.

tasks.title: Update Help Overlay (?) with All New Shortcuts
tasks.description: Comprehensive help screen documenting all Phase 2 shortcuts.

tasks.title: Refactor src/tui/app.rs into Logical Modules
tasks.description: Split the 4733-line file into focused, single-responsibility modules.

metadata.note: Original PRD not archived - reconstructed from taskmaster tasks
